summary: Frontend-only regression + new-feature testing for Perfect RMC landing page (iteration 2). Validated (a) real client brand logos via Google favicon API, (b) new Gallery section with lightbox, (c) SEO meta + LocalBusiness JSON-LD additions. All 12 requirements in the review request passed end-to-end on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). Page loads with 0 critical console errors (only 3 expected 404s from Google's favicon fallback for smaller brands - acceptable per requirement). All previously-working sections (Hero, Services, Process, Stats, WhyUs, Clients, Fleet, Gallery, WhatsApp CTA, Footer) render correctly. No regressions detected.
critical_code_review_comments: Stale comment in Clients.jsx line 5 says 'Clearbit logo CDN' but implementation now uses Google's favicon API (line 22-23). Update comment for clarity.
Gallery.jsx items array (line 6-35) is module-level constant - good. Lightbox correctly uses AnimatePresence with stopPropagation on image so outside click closes - validated.
Real brand logos load via google.com/s2/favicons?domain=X&sz=128 with onError fallback to text-only - graceful degradation working as designed.
JSON-LD LocalBusiness schema is well-formed with @context, telephone array, full PostalAddress, GeoCoordinates, areaServed, openingHoursSpecification and makesOffer - excellent SEO coverage.
Mobile menu bleed-through issue from iteration 1 is FIXED - menu now uses solid bg-[#050505] (verified rgb(5,5,5) at runtime).
test_credentials: N/A - no auth on this site
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure marketing landing page, no backend. Iteration 2 verified: 10 client logos with brand names + favicons (Schneider, GE Vernova, L&T, Voltas, MG Motor, Polycab, Apollo Tyres, Cadila Pharma, Banco, Lafarge - all 10 images loaded successfully via Google favicon API), 4-tile Gallery with working lightbox (opens via click, closes via X button AND via outside/backdrop click), complete SEO meta tags (description, keywords, og:title, og:image, twitter:card, twitter:image, canonical), LocalBusiness JSON-LD schema with all required fields, 6 WhatsApp links all pointing to wa.me/918255009999, FloatingWhatsApp visible after 500px scroll on both desktop and mobile, mobile menu uses solid bg-[#050505] (no bleed-through). 3 console 404s are from Google favicon API fallbacks for smaller brand domains - expected and acceptable per review request.
